caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary under the title "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu." The screen is split into two sections, each featuring a different individual. On the left, a man wearing a red cap and patterned shirt is speaking, while on the right, another man in a black cap with white patterns and glasses is also addressing the camera. Both individuals seem to be engaged in a discussion or interview, possibly related to Nigerian politics. The background on the right side shows a crowd of people, suggesting that the scene might be from a public event or gathering. The overall tone of the video suggests a serious and formal discussion about political matters in Nigeria.
